productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boys Beige Shorts
description: Style NoteGet the apple of your eye up and about in a pair of shorts from gini and jony that play as hard as he does. Team this with a tee and comfy footwear when you take him out the next time. The soft cotton fabric will keep him feeling fresh and comfortable all day long, while he enjoys the outing in style.Product DetailsCool khaki shorts with two insert pockets on the front embellished with contrast thread stitches and contrast zipper, two patch pockets on the back, embroidered artwork at front and back pocket and a zipper flyMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash cool with like colours using a mild detergentDo not tumble dry, bleach or soakWash and dry inside out in shadeWarm iron onlyDo not iron on print/embroidery
